## v5.0
<RN type="new">Add Shiny Health integration — cross-platform health data access for HealthKit (iOS) and Health Connect (Android) with full permissions and entitlements setup</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Update Shiny.Maui.Shell and Shiny.Maui.Shell.UxDiversDialogs to v5.0.0</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Update all 3rd party libraries to their latest versions</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Remove dead packages or those that are not AOT compliant</RN>

## v4.0
<RN type="enhancement">Reorganize all 3rd party libraries and place category in front of each to improve clarity and ensure it is nicely organized on Visual Studio</RN>
